articles.title: Harry Kane at the 2026 World Cup: England's Captain Chasing a First Trophy
articles.excerpt: Harry Kane captains England at his third World Cup in 2026 — the nation's all-time scorer hunting a maiden major trophy, in Group L. Here's his tournament outlook and career context.
